text_block_list.text:
Gold City is full of energy as she prepares for the
Japanese Derby, and her training is going well.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: How was that, Trainer?
choice_data_list: You beat your record time! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not to flatter myself, but I'm in peak form, aren't
I?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I become a Derby champion... that'll make you
a Derby trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.
choice_data_list: What, you don't think it suits me?
What, you don't think it suits me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not what I meant. And, well, we
shouldn't get too ahead of ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's just, it still doesn't feel real that I'm going to
be competing in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I knew I wanted to run, but I didn't really have
specific races I wanted to compete in.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Looking back, I just had this vague notion that I
wanted to win a bunch of G1 races or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But now I'm running in the Derby. Like, what?

Her spirits are high. I'm wondering how we can
ride this wave all the way to the Derby when...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, City! ♪ I'm here. ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Jordan? What, you here to bother me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Why are you so mean?! Emotional damage!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You keep ignoring all my texts too. Have you got
any idea how bored I've been?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why don't you do some training?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you and your work ethic. It's good that
you're motivated, but don't get injured!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You know what happened to Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? What happened?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't know? It happened during a race.
She got caught up in a rough struggle.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I saw her running by the river not long ago. She
looked bad—it was so hard to watch.

After training, we head down to the riverbank to
check on Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Urgh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why can't my body just listen?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: City...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guess ya heard and wanted to see for yourself?
Look at me, I'm a wreck...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No, that's not—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I know. It's no use. I'm just not enough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If only I was stronger... this wouldn't have
happened!

Tamamo Cross is recovering from an injury she
sustained during a race the other day, when a
number of runners clustered together and fell.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Seriously... I lack everything. Stamina, strength, I
don't have anything I needta win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But you...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. It's the truth, and whining won't do
anything about it. But ya know what?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I don't have what it takes, I just gotta snatch it
by force! I'm gonna keep runnin' and runnin' till I
can win!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't need anything but victory! I'll keep tryin'
even if it kills me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I may be poor, and I may be short, but so what?!
I'll force my way through with my own two legs!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So I don't need your sympathy. I'm not gonna
lose, especially not to you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I saw the Satsuki Sho. You surprised everybody.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You already accomplished what ya set out to do.
So, I gotta accomplish my goal too: winning.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Time to keep trainin'. We both gotta stand our
ground and give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...She's so strong.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She doesn't need anything but victory,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll have a chance if she makes it to the
track.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I swear, you think enthusiasm can solve all the
problems in the world.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Let's go back to training. I have more faith in that
than I do in you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I have to show her I can win the Derby!
